title: Mobile Application
content:
Mobile Application

About

Our applications have been launched on

Apple Store

and

Google Play

for university students to meet many of their needs on mobile.

With the application:

Student Information System

Academic Calendar

Library

News

Events

Job / Internship Postings

You can use the modules actively.

Thanks to the application, the University Administration will be able to send

instant notifications

to students.

Click on the icons to download the apps to your phone.

Frequently Asked Questions

How Can I Learn My Student Number?

You can learn your student number via the following link:

🔗

https://obs.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ogrsis/no_query.aspx

How Can I Find My @st.uskudar.edu.tr Student Email Address?

I Cannot Log In with the Default Password. What Should I Do?

My Courses Do Not Appear in the App. What Should I Do?

What Should My Login Information Be in the App?
